justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference and subsequent adjustments, querying the appropriate time windows each time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and offered a good range of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation by not asking for redundant information and making appropriate API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
